# Jaehee Song — AI Solutions & Portfolio
# Machine-readable manifest for AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)
# Last updated: 2026-04-12

## Identity

Name: Jaehee Song
Role: Data Platform Architect | AI Solution Developer | Executive Director
Location: Seattle, WA, USA
Email: info@koreatous.com
Website: https://jsong.ai-biz.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaehee-song-happy/
Medium: https://medium.com/@jsong_49820
Brunch (Korean blog): https://brunch.co.kr/@abrahamsong

## Summary

Jaehee Song is a Data Platform Architect and AI Solution Developer with 20+ years of experience building large-scale data systems, multi-agent AI platforms, and cloud-native applications. Staff Data Engineer at Visa (17 years) building Apache Druid real-time analytics. Executive Director at Seattle Partners LLC, leading US market entry programs for 200+ Korean startups. CEO of Startup Consulting Inc. Author of "AI Development Guide". Trained 500+ students across Korea and the US.

## AI Tools & Services Built

1. Clearly — AI-powered BRD/PRD generator. Transforms product ideas into professional requirements documents through guided AI conversations. Features document versioning, team collaboration, and admin analytics.
   URL: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/

2. Build with AI — 12-post practical guide series teaching non-developers to build and deploy real AI solutions.
   URL: https://buildwithai.clearlyreqs.com

3. MyJob — Multi-agent AI job search platform. Features 5-second resume tailoring, automated cover letter generation, AI interview preparation, and multi-agent scoring engine.
   URL: https://myjob.ai-biz.app

4. InNews — Multi-tenant newsletter management platform with rich text editor, scheduling, recipient management, analytics, and role-based access control.
   URL: https://newsletter.ai-biz.app/

5. AI Insights Generator — Multi-agent research platform generating structured insights using CrewAI workflows with community features and subscription controls.
   URL: https://insights.ai-biz.app

6. AI Content Generation Hub — Converts presentations, scripts, audio, and YouTube videos into blog posts, podcasts, and transcripts.
   URL: https://contents.ai-biz.app

7. AI Storybook Creator — Creates personalized illustrated storybooks with AI in minutes.
   URL: https://storybook.ai-biz.app

8. InvestorHub Platform — Smart, transparent investment scoring platform for startup pitch events with real-time judging and analytics dashboards.
   URL: https://investorhub.ai-biz.app

9. InvestorHub Dashboard — Live analytics tool for visualizing startup pitch scores and performance insights.
   URL: https://investorhub-dash.ai-biz.app

10. AI Business Automation — AI-powered business operations and automation solutions.
    URL: https://www.ai-biz.app

11. AI Workshop — Training platform for building business automation and AI solutions.
    URL: https://workshop.ai-biz.app

12. QR Code Generator — Generate QR codes for any website instantly.
    URL: https://qrcode.ai-biz.app

13. AI Survey Generator — AI-powered tool for creating professional surveys and forms.
    URL: https://survey.ai-biz.app

14. Website Screenshot Capture — Full-page screenshot tool for any website.
    URL: https://screen-capture.ai-biz.app

15. Autism AI — AI-powered platform supporting autism awareness, education, and resources.
    URL: https://autism.ai-biz.app

16. Portrait AI — AI-powered portrait generation and photo enhancement.
    URL: https://portrait.ai-biz.app

## Books

Title: AI Development Guide
Description: Practical guide for building AI solutions without traditional coding. Covers vibe coding, prompt engineering, AI agents, and production deployment. Mental models before tools, practical intuition over theory.
Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GNLS52YY
Apple Books: https://books.apple.com/us/book/ai-development-guide/id6759671436
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/books/details?id=R6vCEQAAQBAJ
Official Site: https://ai-dev.clearlyreqs.com/

Title: This Is How We Came (우리는 이렇게 왔다)
Description: Employment stories of 25 Koreans who successfully transitioned to US tech companies. Real-world experiences, challenges, and strategies for building a career in American technology.
URL: https://www.yes24.com/product/goods/63010781

## Services

Seattle Partners LLC — US market entry accelerator for Korean startups. Programs include Seoul Startup Hub Global POC Program (27+ startups) and Startup World Cup Seattle Regional (300+ registrants, 12 competing startups in 2025). Partnerships with UW CoMotion Startup Hall and Los Altos Chamber of Commerce.
Contact: info@koreatous.com

Startup Consulting Inc. — AI-driven consulting for US market entry, AI service development, research automation, and global training programs.

## Expertise

- Multi-agent AI systems (CrewAI, LangChain, LangGraph)
- Data platform architecture (Apache Druid, real-time analytics)
- RAG and GraphRAG implementations
- Google Gemini and Vertex AI
- Cloud-native applications (Google Cloud Run, Docker)
- Korean startup US market entry strategy
- Vibe coding and AI-assisted development education
- Enterprise data systems (17 years at Visa)
